title: Docs Viewer Roadmap
content_html:
Docs Viewer Roadmap

Current Focus

Diagrams is shipped. Word Document Import is active after WDI-2, with representative proof and closeout next. Scope-First Storage Layout remains active with external-local published-media separation as its first resolved problem; the broader provider-neutral migration remains before Docs Viewer Core Refactor. The other pre-transition sequence remains External Asset Collections association/inventory, Local Tree Move Projection, and Document Packages In Docs Viewer.

Bug fixes, regressions, safety work, and small maintenance continue normally. Paused features remain visible after Standalone Docs Viewer for later reconsideration.

suggested order feature status depends on outcome
1 Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model shipped — establish source, build, published, location, and ownership contracts plus provider-independent workflows before further Docs Viewer work
2 Recent shipped — show recent additions for catalogue-like Moments and recent edits for changing document collections
3 External-Local Scope Media Layout shipped — keep ordinary external-local media in its configured published root and scope lifecycle
4 External Asset Collections proposed Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model; External-Local Scope Media Layout inventory independently owned local project files without turning them into documents
5 Control Surfaces shipped — give controls a consistent definition, host, state, and action model
6 Local Tree Move Projection ready Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model update the local index after a committed move without a full refresh
7 Source Editor Add Image And Add File shipped Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model; Control Surfaces publish staged media into the active document, extract HTML-inline SVG through the same foundation, and retire standalone wrapper imports
8 Document Diagrams shipped Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model; External-Local Scope Media Layout; Source Editor Add Image And Add File build scope-owned Mermaid source into published SVG for authored documentation
9 Word Document Import active — accept staged .docx through Mammoth and the existing HTML import path without expanding the fidelity contract
10 Copy Subtree To Scope shipped — create an independent copy of one parent and its descendants in another existing scope
11 Button Placement shipped Control Surfaces place controls by the user's object of action and promote Open in VS Code to the document toolbar
12 Document Packages In Docs Viewer proposed — move the working document-package profiles and UI into repo-integrated Docs Viewer as an optional non-core capability
13 Scope-First Storage Layout active Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model; External-Local Scope Media Layout make each scope the provider-neutral ownership and lifecycle container with source and published roles beneath it while keeping public deployment destinations independent
14 Docs Viewer Core Refactor proposed Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model; Document Packages In Docs Viewer; Scope-First Storage Layout; Analytics App Retirement extract an explicit core and recompose the integrated application through it without changing product behavior
15 Standalone Docs Viewer proposed Docs Viewer Core Refactor; Scope-First Storage Layout package and release a self-contained external-local application as the first independent core consumer
16 Index Multiple Selection paused Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model; Control Surfaces; Local Tree Move Projection add explicit checkbox selection and group movement
17 Semantic Reference Authoring paused Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model; Docs Viewer Core Refactor improve semantic-reference authoring when a bounded need becomes important
18 Dated Export Snapshots paused Docs Viewer Source And Publication Model retain small browseable snapshots outside Docs Viewer without creating an archive scope
